title: Al Pacino and Robert De Niro Remember ‘The Godfather Part II’ Co-Star Robert Duvall: ‘I Will Miss Him’
content:
ByJack Dunn

Al PacinoandRobert De Nirohave paid tribute toRobert Duvall, whodied on Sundayat the age of 95.

“It was an honor to have worked with Robert Duvall,” Pacino said. “He was a born actor as they say, his connection with it, his understanding and his phenomenal gift will always be remembered. I will miss him.”

“God bless Bobby,” De Niro wrote. “I hope I can live till I’m 95. May he rest in peace.”

Pacino starred alongside Duvall in “The Godfather” and “The Godfather Part II.” Pacino played the heir to the Corleone crime family, Michael, while Duvall appeared as Tom Hagen, his lawyer and trusted advisor. While never appearing in the same scene as Duvall, De Niro also starred in “The Godfather: Part II” as a young Vito Corleone.

Pacino and De Niro are just two of many Hollywood starswho paid tributeto Duvall. Viola Davis wrote on Instagram Threads that it was an “honor” to appear alongside the “Tender Mercies” star in the 2018 thriller “Widows.”

“I was in awe,” Davis added, “I’ve always been in awe of your towering portrayals of men who were both quiet and dominating in their humanness. You were a giant… an icon… ‘Apocalypse Now,’ ‘The Godfather,’ ‘To Kill a Mockingbird,’ ‘Tender Mercies,’ ‘The Apostle,’ ‘Lonesome Dove’… etc… Greatness never dies. It stays… as a gift. Rest well, sir. Your name will be spoken… May flights of angels sing thee to thy rest.”

Adam Sandler, who appeared alongside Duvall in the 2022 sports drama “Hustle,” also remembered Duvall on Instagram. He wrote, “Such a great man to talk to and laugh with. Loved him so much. We all did. So many movies to choose from that were legendary. Watch them when you can. Sending his wife Luciana and all his family and friends our condolences.”
title_zh: 阿爾·帕西諾(Al Pacino)和羅伯特·德尼羅(Robert De Niro)懷念《教父 II》(The Godfather Part II)的共同演員羅伯特·杜瓦爾(Robert Duvall)：「我會想念他的。」
content_zh:
由Jack Dunn報導

阿爾·帕西諾(Al Pacino)和羅伯特·德尼羅(Robert De Niro)向於週日去世，享年95歲的羅伯特·杜瓦爾(Robert Duvall)致敬。

“能與羅伯特·杜瓦爾合作是一種榮幸，”帕西諾說。“他是一位天生的演員，正如人們所說，他與演藝的聯繫、他的理解以及他非凡的天賦將永遠被銘記。我會想念他。”

“上帝保佑巴比，”德尼羅寫道。“我希望我能活到95歲。願他安息。”

帕西諾曾與杜瓦爾在《教父》(The Godfather)和《教父 II》(The Godfather Part II)中同台演出。帕西諾飾演科里昂犯罪家族的繼承人邁克爾，而杜瓦爾則出現為他的律師和信任顧問湯姆·哈根(Tom Hagen)。雖然德尼羅在《教父 II》中從未與杜瓦爾同場演出，但他飾演年輕的維托·科里昂(Vito Corleone)。

帕西諾和德尼羅只是眾多向杜瓦爾致敬的好萊塢明星之一。維奧拉·戴維斯(Viola Davis)在Instagram Threads上寫道，能與這位《溫柔的恩典》(Tender Mercies)明星同台演出是一種“榮幸”，這是在2018年驚悚片《寡婦》(Widows)中。

“我感到敬畏，”戴維斯補充道，“我一直對你那種同時安靜又主導人性的角色感到敬畏。你是一位巨人……一個偶像……《現代啟示錄》(Apocalypse Now)、《教父》(The Godfather)、《殺死一隻知更鳥》(To Kill a Mockingbird)、《溫柔的恩典》(Tender Mercies)、《使徒》(The Apostle)、《孤獨的鴿子》(Lonesome Dove)……等等……偉大永不會消逝。它會留下來……作為一份禮物。安息吧，先生。你的名字將被傳頌……願天使們的歌聲伴你安息。”

亞當·桑德勒(Adam Sandler)在2022年體育劇情片《奮鬥》(Hustle)中與杜瓦爾同台演出，他也在Instagram上回憶起杜瓦爾。他寫道：“與這樣偉大的人交談和歡笑是多麼美好。我非常喜愛他。我們都喜愛他。有如此多傳奇的電影可供選擇。當你有空時請觀看。向他的妻子盧西安娜(Luciana)及所有家人和朋友致以我們的哀悼。”
summary_zh:
由Jack Dunn報導

阿爾·帕西諾(Al Pacino)和羅伯特·德尼羅(Robert De Niro)向於週日去世，享年95歲的羅伯特·杜瓦爾(Robert Duvall)致敬。

“能與羅伯特·杜瓦爾合作是一種榮幸，”帕西諾說。“他是一位天生的演員，正如人們所說，他與演藝的聯繫、他的理解以及他非凡的天賦將永遠被銘記。我會想念他。”

“上帝保佑巴比，”德尼羅寫道。“我希望我能活到95歲。
